notes: Elite Fourum community study, n=5040 packs (95% CI): V 12.58% (1/7.95), VMAX 3.85% (1/25.98), ultra rare 3.85% (1/25.98), rainbow rare 1.19% (1/84.00), secret rare 0.87% (1/114.55). Holo rare rate (1/5.9) from ThePriceDex community aggregate; residual mass on non-holo rare. All hits modeled in the rare slot; reverse filler approximated as a 50/50 common/uncommon split. packSize excludes the basic Energy and code card. ETB SWSH era = 8 packs.
